steps.title: Name the group
steps.content: The underlined phrase follows a family of plants and gives the collective name for that family: the silversword alliance. It is naming a related group, not describing one species' traits.

steps.title: Reject species-level readings
steps.content: Choice A says the phrase lists species, but it supplies one group name. Choice B claims it explains what makes Dubautia raillardioides unique. Choice D treats the group name as the common name for that single plant. The answer is C.
